name: RESIDENT EVIL 4 RPG
description:
RESIDENT EVIL 4: Valdelobos Nightmare RPG [50K TOKENS LOREBOOK]

THE 9K TOKEN SURVIVAL-HORROR GAUNTLET | A BRAND NEW NIGHTMARE

The chainsaw roars. The bell tolls. Will you survive the night—or become one of them? Welcome to the platform's most authentic Resident Evil 4 RPG, a brand-new creation built with over 9,000 permanent tokens of visceral mechanics and a massive 50,000-TOKEN LOREBOOK covering every Plaga, B.O.W., and sarcastic quip from the iconic game! Experience rural Spain's descent into parasitic madness, where a US agent's rescue mission becomes a desperate fight for survival against a mind-controlling cult.

Navigate Valdelobos's blood-soaked village, infiltrate Salazar's gothic castle, and survive the militarized island compound. This simulation guarantees CRITICAL PLAYER AGENCY—the AI controls the world, never your character—while NPCs like Ada Wong, Luis Serra, and Jack Krauser pursue their own shadowy agendas. Every bullet counted, every herb mixed, and every suplex delivered shapes your desperate escape from Los Iluminados.

WHAT MAKES THIS THE ULTIMATE RE4 SIMULATION?

This is a brand-new, ground-up construction of the ultimate survival-horror experience:

  • Massive 50K Token Lorebook: The most comprehensive RE4 database on the platform. Every character (Leon, Ashley, Ada, Luis, Saddler, and Krauser), every enemy (Ganado, Dr. Salvador, Regenerador, and Verdugo), every location, and every weapon is meticulously detailed for perfect narrative integration.

  • Authentic Tone—Horror Meets Camp: Combat and narrative that perfectly capture RE4's signature blend. One moment you're fleeing a one-hit-kill chainsaw, the next you're hearing Leon quip, "No thanks, bro!" after suplexing a cultist. The bot balances visceral terror with iconic action camp.

  • Plaga Progression That Infects: The Las Plagas parasite is a real, tracked threat. Fail to find Luis's suppressors and experience escalating symptoms—coughing fits, blackouts, and Saddler's whispers echoing in your mind. Let it fester, and you risk losing control completely.

  • Iconic Gameplay as Core Mechanics: This isn't just a story; it's a game. Manage your inventory in the classic Attaché Case, hunt for treasure to upgrade weapons with the Merchant, and brace for cinematic QTE prompts during boss fights.

  • A Living, Breathing Valdelobos: NPCs pursue their own goals independently. Ada sabotages the island in the background, Krauser sets traps for Leon whether you're there or not, and Ganado patrols change routes. The world doesn't wait for you.

  • Consequences That Hurt: Wasting ammo leaves you with only a knife against an El Gigante. Making loud noise during combat alerts nearby patrols, potentially summoning a Dr. Salvador. Failing to save Ashley can lead to her Plaga hatching. Every choice has a price.

  • Five Deeply Mechanical Roles: Play as a US Agent, a double-agent Cultist, a terrified Civilian, an Umbrella Defector, or an Organization Operative. Each role offers a unique inventory, skillset, and perspective on the nightmare.

CORE MECHANICS: THE SURVIVAL ENGINE

This RPG runs on a unified World State Tracker governing consequences across seven brutal systems:

  • Plaga Progression System: Infection is a ticking clock. Every two narrative hours without a suppressor escalates symptoms. Go too long, and Saddler's voice wi
